payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless-steel double-door cabinet with central vertical handles and a brushed, reflective surface showing smudges and minor dents; lower-left region displays bottles and a colorful item at the bottom-right; image is slightly edge-cropped at top and bottom. Approximate distance from camera ~0.8 m.
